# Connector Layer 



Adapters Provide external bridges for connections (eg. fetching data) from 

- IRDIA
- GALAXY
- USER provided data (csv)
- USER provided metadata 
...

## Summary table of functions 

| Function | Role | Input | Output | Location |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `adapter_xx.py` |  Adapter for external data source XX | API request parameters | API response data | `libs/connector` |

 ## Reasons behind the choices made



#REVIEW : should those connectors (links to API also done with yaml dictionaries ? )
